content.text: Toxicity-fueled melee brawler. Abilities provide utility around the Burn/Bleed core loop — accuracy support, emergency management, offensive techniques, and contamination exploitation. Distinct from augment mechanics — abilities are trained techniques that complement the reactor.

Toxic Touch (Passive): Your unarmed strikes and melee weapon attacks apply +1 Toxicity to the target on hit. This is in addition to Bleed effects and weapon damage. You're leaking rift energy through your skin — everything you touch gets contaminated. This works even without Bleed augments, giving you contamination application from mission one.
T2 — Trained Techniques (300 cr each, 1 downtime)

rows: When you hit an enemy in melee, heal 1 HP. Per hit, not per turn. Consistent melee contact keeps you alive. At 2 attacks/turn, that's 2 HP/round — small but cumulative.
Your next melee attack applies +3 Toxicity to the target on hit (instead of +1 from Toxic Touch). Concentrated dose. Use on priority targets to push them toward Toxicity thresholds faster.
Reduce your Toxicity by 2. Visible rift energy discharges from your body. Emergency pressure release that doesn't require hitting anything. For when you missed twice and the reactor is climbing.
The first Toxicity penalty threshold's negative effect is halved (round down). At -1 to all checks, you take -0 instead. Your body adapts to what kills others.
When you take damage that puts you below 50% HP, immediately gain +1 AP this turn (once per encounter). Pain triggers a burst of contaminated energy. One extra swing when you're desperate.

You are immune to Poison conditions from enemy attacks. External toxins don't affect you — your body is already saturated with worse. Doesn't affect Toxicity gain, only the Poison condition specifically.

content.text: T3 — Advanced Techniques (600 cr each, 2 downtime)

rows: Consume a condition affecting you (Poison, Bleed, Stun, Hex, Burn) and convert it to +2 Toxicity. The condition is removed. You eat the bad stuff and turn it into fuel. The condition is gone but your Toxicity climbed.

Gain +3 Toxicity. Until end of your next turn, all your melee attacks deal +2 damage per die. Voluntary overdose for burst damage. Stacks with Burns. A Reactor Surge + full Burns turn is the Leech's maximum damage output — and maximum Toxicity climb.

Your next melee attack, if it hits, Grapples the target (Chrome check to escape, DC 6 + your Chrome bonus). While grappled by you, the target takes +2 Toxicity at the start of each of their turns. You hold on and pump them full of contamination.
All enemies within Close range immediately gain Toxicity equal to your Chrome bonus (minimum 2). One-time burst of contamination. Doesn't replace passive Toxic Aura — stacks with it.

When an enemy hits you with a melee attack, they take 1d4 damage (their armor applies). Your blood is actively corrosive. Hitting you costs something — and with Contaminated Blood augment, they also gain +1 Toxicity.

If you are downed (0 HP), emit a contamination pulse. All enemies within Close range gain +3 Toxicity. Even dying, you're dangerous. Works whether or not you have Mutually Assured Destruction — that does damage, this does Toxicity.

content.text: T4 — Master Techniques (1,000 cr each, 3 downtime)

rows: While Meltdown Protocol is active: extend it by 1 round. Costs +3 Toxicity. Can be used once per Meltdown. The eye of the storm lasts a little longer — at a price.

While above Toxicity 15, gain +2 to Chrome and Grit (and their associated bonuses). You're no longer fighting the contamination — you're merging with it. Your body at extreme contamination is stronger than it was clean.

Siphon Strike ability heals 2 HP per hit instead of 1. When you down an enemy in melee, heal HP equal to their Grit stat (minimum 2). You consume what you kill. At 2 hits/turn, that's 4 HP/round + kill bonuses. Genuine melee sustain.

Toxic Aura range extends from adjacent to Close range (10ft). All enemies in range gain +1 Toxicity per round (instead of just adjacent). You can choose to increase it to +2 Toxicity per round, but this affects allies too. The area around you becomes uninhabitable.

Once per mission: when you would collapse from Toxicity (20+), instead of going unconscious, your Toxicity locks at 20 for 2 rounds. During these rounds: all Burns are free, all melee attacks deal +2d6 bonus damage, you are immune to all conditions. After 2 rounds: collapse. Gain a Scar. Toxicity resets to 15.
